stemHtml: Parallels of latitude are special cases of rhumb lines because of which property?

options.a: The parallels run from the North pole to the South pole.
options.b: The centre of the parallels is situated on the Earth’s axis.
options.c: They intersect all meridians at the same angle of 90°.
options.d: The radius of the parallels is always less than the Earth’s radius.
